texto: If your heart takes more pleasure in reading novels, or watching TV, or going to the movies, or talking to friends, rather than just sitting alone with God and embracing Him, sharing His cares and His burdens, weeping and rejoicing with Him, then how are you going to handle forever and ever in His presence...? You'd be bored to tears in heaven, if you're not ecstatic about God now!
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Keith Green que provoca vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. Ao questionar “If your heart takes more pleasure in reading novels, or watching TV, or going to the movies, or t…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre motivacao, belief, christian, com foco em inspiracao e termino.
